text:
The paper exists and is confirmed at its official PMLR proceedings page. 
The official PMLR record lists the sole author as **Junzhe Zhang** only, with no co-author.
 However, 
the Columbia CausalAI Laboratory's own publications page lists the paper as "J. Zhang, E. Bareinboim, ICML-20,"
 attributing it to both authors. This discrepancy between the PMLR record (single author) and the lab page (two authors) suggests a metadata irregularity in the official record rather than fabrication — Elias Bareinboim appears to have been omitted from the PMLR entry. The title, venue, and year all match exactly.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists at its official PMLR page with the exact cited title, venue, and year. The sole discrepancy is that the PMLR record lists only Junzhe Zhang, while the Columbia CausalAI lab page (Bareinboim's own lab) credits both Zhang and Bareinboim — indicating a metadata omission in the PMLR record, not a fabricated reference.
LINK: https://proceedings.mlr.press/v119/zhang20a.html
FOUND_TITLE: Designing Optimal Dynamic Treatment Regimes: A Causal Reinforcement Learning Approach
FOUND_AUTHORS: Junzhe Zhang
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
